channel.title: flove making-of — ranking questions
channel.description: New ranking design questions from flove interviews.

item.title: What engagement ranking and anti-gaming mechanics does nety need?
item.description:
• Simple upvote/downvote — Basic engagement signal — easy to game but simple to implement. • Weighted by trust/stage — Higher-stage users have more influence. Anti-gaming via the identity ladder itself. • Reputation score — Composite score from engagement + trust + contribution history. Complex but robust. • Defer — Don't design yet — keep it abstract until the network has users.
★ decided: — · ◇ recommended: Defer
